flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Rhode Island rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.4k → $37.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Rhode Island rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.3k → $16.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Rhode Island fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Rhode Island rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (52.9% → 59.1%).
